name: geogebra-math-apps-bundle
description: Official GeoGebra Math Apps Bundle for offline Web Runtime operation
notes: The bundle is downloaded during setup, not committed to this repository. Verify GeoGebra's license and redistribution terms at https://www.geogebra.org/license before redistributing a package containing the bundle. The HTML5 codebase version (5.0 vs 5.2) depends on the downloaded bundle version.
